description: A plain black-and-white candid documentary photograph with no graphic design, on-image text, seal, or border. It depicts an outdoor industrial pipe yard: a bearded male worker in a hard hat, safety glasses, and a high-visibility safety vest stands at the rear of a flatbed truck/trailer, guiding or rigging large coated steel pipes with a cable/rope; stacks of big-diameter pipe sit on the trailer and on the ground behind him, and an Alaska license plate ('YZE 834') is visible on the trailer. The monochrome look gives a rugged, heroic 'American labor' aesthetic, but it is an undesigned candid work photo, not a designed meme. It accompanies the same DOL tweet praising skilled energy workers as 'Heroes.' Target audience: workers and the general public.
